title: NSQ Drug Alert: 60 Batches Including Paracetamol, Cefixime, Telmisartan Fail CDSCO Quality Tests in...
summary: New Delhi: In a fresh drug alert highlighting ongoing quality surveillance, 60 batches of drugs and medical devices have been declared Not of Standard Quality (NSQ) by laboratories operating under the...
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
